user_query: What did James use to play when he was younger to let off steam?

selected_nodes.text: James had an awesome time at the amusement park with friends last weekend, going on roller coasters, Ferris wheel, electric cars, and buggies.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Mentions James having fun at an amusement park, which is a form of play and letting off steam.

selected_nodes.text: James has previously played chess and acknowledges its strategic nature.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Discusses James playing chess, which is a childhood activity that can be associated with letting off steam.

selected_nodes.text: James is working on a project to turn his childhood sketches of a main character into a computer game, combining his passions for gaming and storytelling.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Describes James working on a project related to his childhood sketches, indicating a playful engagement with his past.

selected_nodes.text: James and Max enjoy swimming together at the beach or lake.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Mentions James enjoying swimming, which is a playful activity that can help him let off steam.
